name: Applesauce Cake Baked in a Jar
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the shortening and sugar until smooth.
2. Add the eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
3. Mix in the applesauce and water until combined.
4. In a separate bowl, sift together the flour, baking powder, baking soda, salt, cinnamon, and cloves.
5. Gradually blend the dry ingredients into the applesauce mixture.
6. Fold in the chopped nuts if using.
7. Pour the batter into each jar, filling them about half full.
8. Place the jars on a cookie sheet.
9. Bake in a preheated oven at 325°F for 35-45 minutes, or until a cake tester inserted in the center comes out clean.
